title: calamus pahangensis
intro: Calamus pahangensis, also known as Pahang sweet flag, is a type of plant belonging to the family Zingiberaceae, characterized by its rhizomes and aromatic properties. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Calamus pahangensis include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce stress. In herbal preparations, Calamus pahangensis is often used in the form of teas, infusions, and essential oils, and is also used in traditional remedies and Ayurvedic medicine.
